name: Pico De Gallo Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the corn kernels, diced tomatoes, red onion, minced jalapenos, chopped cilantro, lime juice, olive oil, and salt.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the vegetable mixture to the skillet and cook until the corn softens, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Season with salt to taste.
